3309800.name: Dolls Nest ArtWorks
3309800.description:
This is a collection of setting materials for ”Dolls Nest”, a 3D action game by NITRO PLUS.
It contains many original game designs, including design drawings and artwork for weapons and equipment.

How to view the setting materials

After downloading the setting materials, you can view them from the game's installation folder.
In the Steam app, right-click on "LIBRARY" > "Dolls Nest" > "Manage" > "Browse local files" to open the installation folder.
The "Dolls Nest ArtWorks" folder in the opened folder is the setting materials folder.

  • Purchase of “Dolls Nest” is required to download this content.

  • This content will be available for a limited time, until May 23, 2025.

  • If downloaded within this period, you will be able to continue to enjoy the content afterwards.
